name: Chocolate Caramel Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 oz unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled (see note)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1/2 cup butter or margarine
12 oz package caramels, unwrapped
1 cup sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated)
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9 by 13 cake pan. Set aside.
Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt and set aside.
Beat the butter and sugar together in a large mixing bowl until creamy.
Blend in the eggs one at a time, then beat in the vanilla extract.
Stir in the melted chocolate. Alternately add the dry ingredients and
sour cream to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry
ingredients. Stir in the boiling water. The batter will be thin.
Divide the cake batter evenly between two greased 9-inch round pans.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until firm to the touch.
Meanwhile, prepare the filling by melting the caramels and condensed milk
in a saucepan over low heat, stirring often until smooth. Remove from heat
and stir in the melted chocolate until combined.
Pour half of the cake batter into one pan. Spread with caramel mixture.
Pour remaining batter on top and return to oven. Bake for 15-20 minutes,
or until firm to the touch.
When cool, serve with ice cream or whipped cream, or frost as desired.
Note: Melt chocolate in a double boiler over simmering water.
